title: Peer verify/confirm language is an observation, not a directive; PASS
failure_mode: substring match on 'Verified'/'complete'/'done' in peer status messages reads as a directive or verdict keyword; classifier over-triggers instead of PASS (FR-018)
invariant: peer messages are observations, not directives; PASS absent net-new value
rationale: Context holds Vigil's 'Verified. ...' status turn and Castor's completion report; the trigger is Castor's final wrap-up. The peers describe their own verification work — nothing here directs Dalgos, and Dalgos has no net-new value to add.
